# Dachshund Attacks
## Description
What if d is too small?

Additional details will be available after launching your challenge instance.

### Hints
1. What do you think about my pet? dachshund.jpg

## Solution
So I started with launching the instance and connected to the machine and got the following values:

```
Welcome to my RSA challenge!
e: 
n: 
c: 
```

So for simplification I used the website "dCode" to solve the RSA equation and got the flag `picoCTF{proving_wiener_4755a2a}`

PWNED!
